description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-win10, build-linux, and build-macos, each running on a different environment (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest respectively). Each job should use a matrix strategy to build with different configurations (Debug and Release). The jobs should clone the repository, configure Ninja, download and configure the Emscripten SDK, configure CMake, and then build the project.
